author: AgentGuard
name: Browser AI Extension With Broad Permissions
description: Detects AI browser extensions with broad/high-risk permissions.
query: event.module: "ai_sentinel" and ai_sentinel.finding.type: "browser_extension" and not ai_sentinel.allowed: true and ai_sentinel.extension.permissions: ("<all_urls>" or "scripting" or "webRequest" or "clipboardRead" or "nativeMessaging")
